offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/week, manual data extraction causes delayed insights. We automate weekly sales pipeline data extracts instead of manual data extraction and analysis using spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to quickly access and analyze sales pipeline data for decision-making.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Shopify store owners with demo video
Community forums where Shopify owners share tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly dashboard for data visualization
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
